instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall delay upshift when throttle position is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit upshift when Throttle_Position exceeds High_Throttle_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > High_Throttle_Threshold THEN Upshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Position <= High_Throttle_Threshold THEN Upshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Position > High_Throttle_Threshold AND Upshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger early upshift when throttle input is low.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform upshift when Throttle_Position falls below Economy_Throttle.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position < Economy_Throttle AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Trigger_Early_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable downshift during aggressive throttle input.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Throttle_Position exceeds Kickdown_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Kickdown_Threshold AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict gear changes during unstable throttle input.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shifting when throttle fluctuation exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Variation > Throttle_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Variation <= Throttle_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Variation > Throttle_Variance AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent upshift during full throttle operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit upshift when Throttle_Position equals Maximum.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position = Maximum THEN Upshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Position < Maximum THEN Upshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Position = Maximum AND Upshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable normal shifting when throttle position is within moderate range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow shifting when Throttle_Position is between Moderate_Min and Moderate_Max.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position >= Moderate_Min AND Throttle_Position <= Moderate_Max THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Position < Moderate_Min OR Throttle_Position > Moderate_Max THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Position NOT_IN Moderate_Range AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall delay downshift when throttle position is low.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent downshift when Throttle_Position is below Downshift_Throttle.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position < Downshift_Throttle THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Position >= Downshift_Throttle THEN Downshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Position < Downshift_Throttle AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger performance mode shifting during high throttle input.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate performance shifting when Throttle_Position exceeds Performance_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Performance_Threshold AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Delay_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when throttle signal becomes invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Throttle_Signal_Valid equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Signal_Valid = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Signal_Valid = FALSE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent downshift when throttle position is minimal.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit downshift when Throttle_Position is below Idle_Throttle.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position < Idle_Throttle THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Position >= Idle_Throttle THEN Downshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Position < Idle_Throttle AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift
IF Throttle_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable aggressive shifting during rapid throttle increase.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when throttle rate of change exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Rate > Throttle_Rate_Limit AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict shifting when throttle input fluctuates excessively.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift requests when throttle oscillation exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Oscillation > Oscillation_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Oscillation <= Oscillation_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Oscillation > Oscillation_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain gear when throttle demand is constant.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear change when throttle position remains constant.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position_Stable = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable upshift when throttle demand decreases.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when throttle position drops below Upshift_Throttle.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position < Upshift_Throttle AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Trigger_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when throttle signal becomes erratic.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when throttle signal error is detected.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Signal_Error = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Throttle_Signal_Error = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Throttle_Signal_Error = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
